content: It's been really hard lately. I feel like I’m drowning with all these projects, and no matter how much I work, I just can't keep up. I keep telling myself that if I don't get everything perfect, I’ll fail or let everyone down. Sometimes I just avoid starting the tough tasks because I’m afraid I’ll mess up again. It all makes me feel trapped, like there’s no way out of this constant pressure.

It’s just… after the dinner, I felt so small, like I wasn’t even there. When she said that about my job, I just wanted to disappear, you know? I kept thinking everyone’s probably thinking I’m a failure, like I can't do anything right. I felt really overwhelmed and kind of numb, and I just left early to get away from it all. Honestly, I’ve been avoiding the family stuff ever since because I’m scared it’ll happen again and I’ll just feel worse.

I guess I just felt pretty invisible, you know? Like, no matter what I do, it's never enough to get noticed or appreciated by my family. When everyone was praising my siblings, I just felt really small and like I didn’t matter. It hurt so much when I saw them ignore what I achieved recently. Honestly, I just wanted to leave early because being there made me feel even more like I don’t belong.

Um, I guess I just feel really nervous at parties, you know? Like, I have to keep checking if everyone’s okay or if they’re having a good time, or else they might think I’m boring or not worth being around. Sometimes I laugh a lot, even if I don’t find the joke funny, just to make sure they like me. It’s kind of exhausting trying to make everything perfect, but I just worry if I don’t do that, I’ll be rejected or left out. Honestly, I just want to be accepted and not feel so anxious all the time.

Honestly, I just felt like everything was spiraling again, like I couldn’t keep up with all the chaos. When they started talking about their problems, I got overwhelmed really fast, and I just wanted to escape. I kept thinking, “Why can’t I keep everything under control?” It’s like, if I try to be part of it, I’ll only mess up or make things worse. So, I just left early because I couldn’t handle the feelings anymore.
